audit.summary: Continental Cafe has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: core services are not instantly clear.

findings.title: Core services are not instantly clear
findings.evidence: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Continental restaurant.
findings.fix: Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.

findings.title: Page is hard to scan
findings.fix: Add clear section headings for services, proof, service area, and final CTA.

findings.title: Visual proof is under-explained
findings.evidence: Few captured images include descriptive alt text or proof context.
findings.fix: Use before/after or job-site proof with descriptive captions and useful alt text.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Continental restaurant.
proofPoints: 300 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
coldMessageDraft: Hey Continental, I was looking at Continental Cafe in Brisbane. I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: Expected services were not all visible in captured text: Continental restaurant. I made a quick note on what I would tighten first; happy to send it over if useful.
followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on Continental Cafe: the main opportunity I noticed is Show 3-5 core services near the top with plain-language outcomes.. Worth me sending the short audit?
guardrails: This is a draft, not a final send.
Do not mention review body text.
Do not claim Google API verification until it has been run.
Find email/contact path only after operator accepts the offer angle.
